3021290.name: Iconic
3021290.description:
🔥 Clicker Heroes meets Vampire Survivors

Iconic is a frantic, lane-based survival roguelite that fuses tight mechanics with relentless pressure. Fast clicks. Sharp reflexes. Tactical thinking. It’s a rush of decisions and destruction where every move matters, and hesitation is fatal.

🔧 Tactical, Skill-Based Action

In Iconic, every second counts. This isn’t a game you coast through—it’s a gauntlet built for focus, not filler. While other survival roguelites drag you through 30-minute marathons, Iconic delivers a few minutes of pure intensity. You don’t invest time—you invest attention. Blink, and you’re dead. Think fast, act faster, and make every move count.

🧠 Evolving Meta. Real Progression,

Beyond the chaos lies depth. Unlock a rich meta-progression system, stacked with upgrades, different game modes, and strategic choices that reward smart play. No grinding. No fluff. Just steady evolution—your way, your pace.

🎮 Smash. Slam. Repeat.

Click hard, click fast. Wipe out waves of enemies, juggle lanes, and keep the chaos under control. It’s all about quick moves and well timed hits.

Battle an army of merciless monster icons in this lane-based horde survival roguelite frenzy and put an end to their evil endeavors. By clicking.

⚠️ Please note that this game is still in active development.
Visuals, features, and gameplay are all evolving—what you see now may improve, change, or be replaced entirely. If something feels missing or rough, it’s probably on our list!
3021290.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
